tests.name: planner json_filter accepts combined gte and lte bounds in one filter value
planner iteration running=false notification is fire-and-forget
planner retries malformed json_filter schema-placeholder args once and then succeeds
planner accepts exact nested value scalar wrappers in json_filter args
planner malformed json_filter schema-placeholder args fail on invalid response limit after retry
planner json_filter supports scalar timestamp ranges on object-root array collections
planner returns recoverable json_filter collectionPath guidance without counting an invalid response
planner json_filter falls back to embedded JSON in command-output text and reports ignored prefix
planner surfaces explicit invalid-json message when json_filter fallback cannot parse any valid section
planner failures write failed artifacts through status posts
powershell shim preserves pipeline order for oversized planner input
planner debug dumps always write to the repo-local logs directory
planner read_lines tool results use a compact numbered text block
planner rejects semantically repeated nearby read_lines calls and reprompts for finish
planner keeps the first real tool output and rewrites one duplicate warning tool turn through x5
planner find_text and json_filter results use compact text blocks in prompts and debug dumps
planner keeps short read_lines output when reported token count is high
planner keeps tool results when they stay within 70 percent of remaining stop-line tokens
planner keeps read_lines output when tokenize is unavailable
planner fits oversized read_lines output and reports omitted lines
planner advances repeated read_lines calls to one unread span
planner advances repeated read_lines calls from fitted returned lines only
planner forced finish rejects read_lines before unread expansion
planner fits oversized find_text output and reports omitted results
planner activates once input exceeds 75 percent of context length even before chunking would start
planner allows up to thirty tool calls while prompt headroom remains without visible budget counters
planner reuses one slot within a request and assigns a new slot to the next request
planner fails fast when the next planner turn would exceed non-thinking headroom
planner fails fast when the next planner turn would exceed thinking headroom
